completedWork: Voltage Doubler Simulation - NEW: Interactive voltage doubler circuit simulation with real-time waveform visualization. Shows how capacitors and diodes work together to double input voltage. Features animated circuit diagram showing current flow during positive/negative half-cycles, adjustable parameters (input voltage 5-50V, frequency 1-60Hz, capacitor values 1-100µF), real-time waveform display on canvas showing input AC vs output DC (2×Vin), live circuit analysis including capacitor voltages, reactance, time constants, ripple voltage calculation, and efficiency metrics. Educational content covers operation principle (positive half-cycle charges C1, negative half-cycle charges C2 to 2×Vin), key formulas (V_C1 = V_peak, V_C2 ≈ 2×V_peak, ripple calculation), design tips, common applications (high-voltage supplies, CRT displays, photomultipliers, laser supplies, X-ray systems), and safety considerations. Play/pause/animation speed controls included.

Nodal Analysis Calculator - NEW: Advanced circuit analysis tool using nodal analysis method with three circuit configurations: 2-node parallel circuit, 3-node T-network, and Wheatstone bridge. Interactive SVG circuit diagrams for each configuration type. For 2-node: parallel circuit with current source and 3 resistors. For 3-node: T-network with 2 current sources and 3 resistors. For bridge: complete Wheatstone bridge with voltage source and 5 resistors. Real-time calculations of node voltages, branch currents, power dissipation, equivalent resistance, and total power. Special bridge analysis includes balance detection (R1/R2 = R3/R4) and bridge voltage measurement. Step-by-step solution display showing: node identification, KCL equations, conductance matrix formation, and solution method using Cramer's rule. Comprehensive educational content on key concepts (reference node, KCL, matrix form, supernodes), when to use nodal analysis vs mesh analysis, and pro tips for circuit analysis. All parameters adjustable via sliders and number inputs with real-time updates.
